concepts.title: Moduli problems and parameters
concepts.blurb: A moduli problem asks for a geometric space classifying objects in families.

concepts.title: Fine versus coarse moduli
concepts.blurb: Universal families may fail; coarse moduli still classify isomorphism classes.

concepts.title: Level structure and compactification ideas
concepts.blurb: Rigidifying data often repairs representability and leads to richer moduli stacks/spaces.
